since_last: 30% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.49%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 30% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -0.57% · Gold -0.91% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 30% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.49%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.49%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -4.34%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CGNX is the standout at -10.01%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +8.29%, WDAY +4.07%, INTU +3.81%, SAP +3.12%, NOW +2.50%. Laggards: CGNX -10.01%, INTC -9.88%, AMBA -8.71%, TER -8.28%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.18% at $150.5
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.18% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
